Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Can I talk to you for a moment?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So, not only do you excel at providing support during battle, you are also quite skilled at gathering information.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Oh, I-I'm sorry for doing that without permission.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Don't worry, you're not in trouble. But I do have an important favor to ask of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I want you to find out as much as you can about that incident ten years ago.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Oh, well, very little of that was made public...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I know. That's why I want you to access the Kirijo Group's database.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You mean, hack into their system?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'll give you my ID and password. Then you won't be held accountable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}But I need to know the truth. In detail.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Of course, I'll understand if you refuse.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Yamagishi... Aren't you resentful?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Regardless of my good intentions, I did drag you into this without fully explaining.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I'm sure you must have at least a few complaints?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Did you know my entire family's made up of doctors? My parents are the one exception.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}It gives them a bit of an inferiority complex. That's why they're so hard on me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}But here, I'm able to do something no one else can. I have a purpose.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}So no, I don't have any complaints.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}You're right. We can't do this without you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}No one could take your place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Thank you. I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}
